授業目的: This course provides students with a unique opportunity to learn about HR management and Employment Management in Japanese companies, by focusing on the unique background and characteristics of Japanese Companies. The course is conducted by lecture, and by interactive discussion among the students, and practice sessions.
到達目標: Students are expected to:1. Familiarize themselves with HR management system and Employment System adopted by established Japanese companies.2. Focus their understanding on the history and the issues to solve for Japanese companies for their future implementation to the business.3. Encourage themselves to be future business leaders at the established Japanese companies.
授業方法: Face to face format lecture followed by the class discussions based on business cases.Students are expected to participate to the class discussions actively.

第1回:
【Startup Week】 https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=96ba0dc8-3f29-400d-99ea-b406018017ed
Online class (On-demand format)《60minutes》
Introduction; In this session, introduction of lecturer, objectives and targets of the course, outline of the Human Resources Management, and expected developing skills by taking this course are explained by the lecturer. Assignment is to be instructed in the class.

Pre-class learnings; Read the syllabus and understand the course target.
Post-Class learnings; Prepare assignment instructed in the online class.
第2回:
【Core Weeks①】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
History of Japanese Company and its HR Management; In this session, the history of modern Japanese economy and industry development related to the characteristic of Japanese company and its HR Management are explained, followed by class discussion.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第3回:
【Core Weeks②】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Working Motivation and Leadership; In this session, the basics of motivation, leadership and its development are explained by the lecturer, followed by the class discussion about motivation and leadership in order to put them into practice.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第4回:
【Core Weeks③】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Organization Structure; In this session, the purpose of the organization, the basics of organization structure, examples of organization structure in Japanese companies are explained by the lecturer, followed by class discussion about pros and cons of Japanese companies’ organization.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第5回:
【Core Weeks④】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Organization design practice referring to the organization structure studies of Session 4.
Through an origami activity drawn from Japanese culture, students learn the importance of division of labor and coordination in organizational design. Students also reflect on and summarize the insights gained from the activity.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第6回:
【Core Weeks⑤】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Employment Management; In this session, Japan’s unique Life-Time Employment, HR grading system (membership-based grading, job/role-based grading), Talent Management, and those changes in today’s circumstances are explained by the lecturer, followed by class discussion among the students.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第7回:
【Flex Hours】
Field Trip《120minutes》Date : November 7th Saturday
Glico Museum visit; We will trace the history of Ezaki Glico Co., Ltd., spanning over 100 years since its founding by Rikichi Ezaki, who launched the business with the aspiration to contribute to society through nutritious foods, and learn about its corporate philosophy and the growth and evolution of its business.Public transportation fee is needed.（The date and time are  subject to change due to scheduling arrangements.）

Pre-class learnings; Review the materials and videos about the museum guided by the lecturer in advance to prepare for learning at the visit location.
Post-class learnings; Review the information and the materials from this field trip
第8回:
【Core Weeks⑥】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Personnel Evaluation & Wage System; In this session, the traditional personnel evaluation system, and the wage system in Japanese companies, and the changes in those systems are explained by the lecturer. The management by objective (MBO) is one of the important topics in this class.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第9回:
【Core Weeks⑦】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Team Management Practice Session1; In this session, based on the studies from previous classes, the role-playing session is conducted, aiming at practical understanding of the team management and the leadership at workplace.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第10回:
【Core Weeks⑧】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Team Management Practice Session2; In this session, the role-playing session is to be continued , followed by the review session by the students, and the summary by the lecturer.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第11回:
【Core Weeks⑨】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Gender Equality & Diversity; In this session, the background of gender inequality in Japan, M-shaped curve, the promotion of female workers, and issues of foreign workers are explained by the lecturer, followed by class discussions among the students.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第12回:
【Core Weeks⑩】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Guest Speaker Session; An experienced businessperson is invited to the class, and the speaker talks about his/her experience in regard to the HR management meeting to the company’s strategy, hardships in its practice, and the suggestions for the students to be active business leaders.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第13回:
【Core Weeks⑪】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
HR Management System Practice; In this session, based on the studies from previous classes, students work on building a HR management system as a practice through group-work. Various aspects of HR management, such as employment, evaluation and wage system are to be discussed in the group.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第14回:
【Core Weeks⑫】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Summary; As a summary of this course, lecturer review the key issues for the practical business implementations. Students do the presentation of their study summary.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第15回:
【Flex Hours】
Online class (Task-oriented format)《90minutes》
As preparation for the Term Paper, summarize the learnings following the instruction by the lecturer. Identify the key factors for each subject of HR Management.
Review and organize each class subject and its associated discussions and make the necessary preparations for the task.

参考文献・資料/Reference books0: To be advised by lecturer in the class.

DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。

name: 【300】総合日本学習科目（人材マネジメントと雇用システム）／JSC HR Management and Employment
